text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Are you ready? Then let's begin.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
However small the step, we must get closer to perfecting the winning
equation... There's nothing left to do but recalculate, revise, and
reformulate!

With the task of running in Narita Brian's place left to her, Biwa
Hayahide is determined to race in the Sprout Kinen.

However, given the high expectations for Brian, this sudden change is
sure to disappoint her fans.
But the erudite racer continues onward, undeterred.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Though, to be honest, I would be lying if I said I wasn't worried.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But I have hope... There are people who believe I can prove my
theory and complete the winning equation.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: And...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And what kind of big sister would I be if I could not even keep a
promise to my sister?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
That reminds me. Let me know if all this brainstorming is making you
feel hungry.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I happen to have some curry I prepared last night.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Yes, the diced vegetables stewed quite nicely... It's a nutritious curry
that even picky eaters would enjoy.

Unable to resist the offer, we chow down while working on the
equation, and time flies by.

It's the day of the Sprout Kinen. Under a perfectly clear sky, a throng
of spectators come to the track to see the big race.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Good morning. The weather and wind speed appear satisfactory.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I am in ideal shape to perform at my best. Still...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I'd like one final strategy meeting with you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I have a complete rundown on our opponents. The focus will be on
two in particular.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We should expect the local favorite, Through Passport, to be a
skilled front runner. That was her running style for each of the past
twelve scrimmages, you see.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And Titan Frypan will make a definite move from the center. The
likelihood of a late surge approach is incredibly high.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Their caution and mental strength are rather... comparable to Brian's.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Perfect opponents? Hahaha, you sure are confident. One might even
say optimistic.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Though I suppose this daring positivity of yours does help ease my
tension.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: It's time... Shall we?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: (Brian... I hope you're watching.)

text_block_list.name: Young Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... All right! Watch me pick up the pace, Brian!

text_block_list.name: Young Brian
text_block_list.text: Wow! Me too, me too! I'm gonna catch you, Sis!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
(Or since you left me behind already, maybe you can't even see me
anymore.)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: (Never mind... That doesn't matter now.)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I'm going to show you... I'll make you remember.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: You'll remember what it was like trailing behind me!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's fair blue skies today for the Sprout Kinen! And these ten leaders
of the next generation are sure going to give us a fantastic show!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: (All right, an excellent start!)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
What's this?! Through Passport, the experienced front runner, is
having some trouble! She's dragging behind! What could be wrong?!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And Biwa Hayahide, subbing for Narita Brian, is pushing to the front!
Meanwhile, the highly anticipated Titan Frypan has a firm position in
the back!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: The results will be proof that I'm correct!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: My technique is my theory! The winning equation!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
They're approaching the final corner! And here comes Titan Frypan!
She's flying around from the outside!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I won't let you overtake me now!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Look at this! Biwa Hayahide pulls ahead! How does she have the
stamina left after staying in front for so long?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Watch me...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: You'll be the one trying to keep up, Brian!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Biwa Hayahide's leaving them behind! What a tremendous sprint!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide! It's Biwa Hayahide! The big name of the new
generation is Biwa Hayahide!
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: First place. Well, not surprising.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: As expected of my big sis.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeeeaaah! BIWA HAYAHIDE! That was an amazing race, huh,
Taishin?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: So damn loud... Go bother someone else. I'm leaving.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh?! W-w-wait a sec! Where are you going?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I have to train.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Gasp! I get it! Seeing Hayahide got you all fired up! I know exactly how you feel!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'm coming tooooo! It's training time! Whoo-hooooo!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: That's not why... Hey! Quit following me!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: There... We've gotten the result we were looking for.
choice_data_list:
That's one step closer to completing the
winning equation.

That's one step closer to completing the
winning equation.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Heheh... Indeed. But that means we still have a long way to go.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: No matter though... We will get there, eventually.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: With that said, let's head back and get to work!

Our days of trying to perfect the winning equation together have
begun!
